message:
refactor(plan): Improve async test helpers with explicit polling

Enhance test infrastructure for observational equivalence verification
with better control over async task polling:

src/plan/mod.rs:
- Add await_handle() helper that explicitly polls task handles
- Use try_join() + yield loop for deterministic scheduling
- Handle cancellation explicitly in polling loop
- Refactor join_branch() to use await_handle()
- Refactor race_branch() to use explicit try_join() polling
- Eliminate Select combinator dependency in tests

tests/phase0_verification.rs:
- Expand verification test cases
- Add more interleaving scenarios
- Improve budget exhaustion testing
- Better coverage of edge cases in rewrite semantics

This refactoring makes tests more deterministic by giving explicit
control over when and how tasks are polled, which is essential for
verifying that rewrites preserve behavior under all scheduling orders.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
